items.title: Function declarations, expressions and arrows: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? Arrow functions are shorter syntax for every function and can always replace methods or constructors.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Arrow functions have lexical this and are not constructible; choose a form from call semantics, not length.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Arrow functions have lexical this and are not constructible; choose a form from call semantics, not length.
